verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سُورَةٌ أَنزَلْنَٰهَا وَفَرَضْنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَٰتٍۢ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: A sūra – We have sent it down and made it obligatory, and We have sent down in it clear signs, so that you may take heed.

canonical_variants.arabic: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَّضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: A surah that We have sent down and did ordain and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَّضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَا ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: A surah that We have sent down and did ordain and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: A surah that We have sent down and ordained and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمۡ تَذَكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: A surah that We have sent down and ordained and sent down in it evident signs, that you may remind yourselves.

canonical_variants.arabic: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَّضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَا ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: A surah that We have sent down and did ordain and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلۡنَٰهَا وَفَرَّضۡنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلۡنَا فِيهَا ءَايَٰتِۭ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمُۥ تَذَّكَّرُونَ
canonical_variants.english: A surah that We have sent down and did ordain and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: سُورَةٌ أَنزَلْنَٰهَا وَفَرَضْنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلْنَا فِيهَا ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: A surah that We have sent down and ordained and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.

canonical_variants.arabic: سُورَةٌ اَنزَلْنَٰهَا وَفَرَضْنَٰهَا وَأَنزَلْنَا فِيهَآ ءَايَٰتِۢ بَيِّنَٰتٖ لَّعَلَّكُمْ تَذَّكَّرُونَۖ
canonical_variants.english: A surah that We have sent down and ordained and sent down in it evident signs, that you may constantly remember.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلزَّانِيَةُ وَٱلزَّانِى فَٱجْلِدُوا۟ كُلَّ وَٰحِدٍۢ مِّنْهُمَا مِا۟ئَةَ جَلْدَةٍۢ ۖ وَلَا تَأْخُذْكُم بِهِمَا رَأْفَةٌۭ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ إِن كُنتُمْ تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَٱلْيَوْمِ ٱلْءَاخِرِ ۖ وَلْيَشْهَدْ عَذَابَهُمَا طَآئِفَةٌۭ مِّنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: The adulterous woman and the adulterous man – flog each one of them a hundred lashes, and let no pity for the two of them affect you concerning the religion of God, if you believe in God and the Last Day. And let a group of the believers witness their punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلزَّانِى لَا يَنكِحُ إِلَّا زَانِيَةً أَوْ مُشْرِكَةًۭ وَٱلزَّانِيَةُ لَا يَنكِحُهَآ إِلَّا زَانٍ أَوْ مُشْرِكٌۭ ۚ وَحُرِّمَ ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: The adulterous man shall marry no one but an adulterous woman or an idolatrous woman, and the adulterous woman – no one shall marry her but an adulterous man or an idolatrous man. That is forbidden to the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ ٱلْمُحْصَنَٰتِ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَأْتُوا۟ بِأَرْبَعَةِ شُهَدَآءَ فَٱجْلِدُوهُمْ ثَمَٰنِينَ جَلْدَةًۭ وَلَا تَقْبَلُوا۟ لَهُمْ شَهَٰدَةً أَبَدًۭا ۚ وَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: Those who hurl (accusations) against women of reputation, (and) then do not bring four witnesses, flog them eighty lashes, and do not accept their testimony ever (again). Those – they are the wicked,

verses.quran_arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ تَابُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ ذَٰلِكَ وَأَصْلَحُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: except for those who turn (in repentance) after that and set (things) right. Surely God is forgiving, compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ أَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ شُهَدَآءُ إِلَّآ أَنفُسُهُمْ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمْ أَرْبَعُ شَهَٰدَٰتٍۭ بِٱللَّهِ ۙ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Those who hurl (accusations) against their wives, and have no witnesses except themselves, the testimony of such a person shall be to bear witness four times ‘by God,’ that he is indeed one of the truthful,

canonical_variants.arabic: وَاَلَّذِينَ يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّآ أَنفُسُهُمۡ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمۡ أَرۡبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۢ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَاَلَّذِينَ  يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّا أَنفُسُهُمۡ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمۡ أَرۡبَعَ  شَهَٰدَٰتِۢ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ شُهَدَآءُ إِلَّآ أَنفُسُهُمۡ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمۡ أَرۡبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۭ بِٱللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمۡ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمۡ شُهَدَآءُ إِلَّآ أَنفُسُهُمۡ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمۡ أَرۡبَعُ شَهَٰدَٰتِۭ بِٱللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then let the testimony of one of them be four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمُۥ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمُۥ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّا أَنفُسُهُمُۥ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمُۥ أَرۡبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۭ بِٱللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَرۡمُونَ أَزۡوَٰجَهُمُۥ وَلَمۡ يَكُن لَّهُمُۥ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّا أَنفُسُهُمُۥ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمُۥ أَرۡبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۭ بِٱللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالذِينَ يَرْمُونَ أَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّا أَنفُسُهُمْ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمْ أَرْبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۢ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالذِينَ يَرْمُونَ أَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُمْ شُهَدَآءُ اِ۪لَّآ أَنفُسُهُمْ فَشَهَٰدَةُ أَحَدِهِمُۥٓ أَرْبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتِۢ بِاللَّهِ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And those who accuse their own spouses but have no witnesses except themselves, then the testimony of one of them (is binding)—four oaths by Allah that he is surely of the truthful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ لَعْنَتَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْكَٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: and the fifth time, that the curse of God (be) upon him if he is one of the liars.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالْخَٰمِسَةُ أَن لَّعْنَتُ اُ۬للَّهِ عَلَيْهِ إِن كَانَ مِنَ اَ۬لْكَٰذِبِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is: may Allah’s curse be upon him if he is of the liars.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالْخَٰمِسَةُ أَن لَّعْنَتُ اُ۬للَّهِ عَلَيْهِ إِن كَانَ مِنَ اَ۬لْكَٰذِبِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is: may Allah’s curse be upon him if he is of the liars.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَدْرَؤُا۟ عَنْهَا ٱلْعَذَابَ أَن تَشْهَدَ أَرْبَعَ شَهَٰدَٰتٍۭ بِٱللَّهِ ۙ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَٰذِبِينَ
verses.text: And it shall avert the punishment from her that she bear witness four times ‘by God,’ that he is indeed one of the liars,

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْخَٰمِسَةَ أَنَّ غَضَبَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْهَآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: and the fifth time, that the anger of God (be) upon her if he is one of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَاَلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ اَ۬للَّهِ عَلَيۡهَآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَاَلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ اَ۬للَّهِ عَلَيۡهَا إِن كَانَ مِنَ  اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡهَآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلۡخَٰمِسَةَ أَنَّ غَضَبَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡهَآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: while the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡهَا إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَٱلۡخَٰمِسَةُ أَنَّ غَضَبَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيۡهَا إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلصَّٰدِقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is: may Allah’s wrath indeed be upon her if he is of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالْخَٰمِسَةُ أَنْ غَضِبَ اَ۬للَّهُ عَلَيْهَا إِن كَانَ مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is that Allah’s wrath will have fallen upon her if he is of the truthful.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالْخَٰمِسَةُ أَنْ غَضِبَ اَ۬للَّهُ عَلَيْهَآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ اَ۬لصَّٰدِقِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And the fifth is that Allah’s wrath will have fallen upon her if he is of the truthful.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُۥ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ تَوَّابٌ حَكِيمٌ
verses.text: And if (it were) not (for the) favor of God on you, and His mercy, and that God turns (in forgiveness), wise [. . .].

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ جَآءُو بِٱلْإِفْكِ عُصْبَةٌۭ مِّنكُمْ ۚ لَا تَحْسَبُوهُ شَرًّۭا لَّكُم ۖ بَلْ هُوَ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكُمْ ۚ لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍۢ مِّنْهُم مَّا ٱكْتَسَبَ مِنَ ٱلْإِثْمِ ۚ وَٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ كِبْرَهُۥ مِنْهُمْ لَهُۥ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Surely those who brought the lie are a group of you. Do not think it a bad (thing) for you – No! It is good for you! Each one of them will bear what sin he has earned, and the one who took upon himself the greater part of it – for him (there will be) a great punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّوْلَآ إِذْ سَمِعْتُمُوهُ ظَنَّ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتُ بِأَنفُسِهِمْ خَيْرًۭا وَقَالُوا۟ هَٰذَآ إِفْكٌۭ مُّبِينٌۭ
verses.text: Why, when you heard it, did the believing men and the believing women not think better of themselves, and say, ‘This is a clear lie’?

verses.quran_arabic: لَّوْلَا جَآءُو عَلَيْهِ بِأَرْبَعَةِ شُهَدَآءَ ۚ فَإِذْ لَمْ يَأْتُوا۟ بِٱلشُّهَدَآءِ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُمُ ٱلْكَٰذِبُونَ
verses.text: Why did they not bring four witnesses concerning it? Since they did not bring the witnesses, they are liars in the sight of God.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُۥ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلْءَاخِرَةِ لَمَسَّكُمْ فِى مَآ أَفَضْتُمْ فِيهِ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ
verses.text: If (it were) not (for the) favor of God on you, and His mercy, in this world and the Hereafter, a great punishment would have touched you for what you spread about.

verses.quran_arabic: إِذْ تَلَقَّوْنَهُۥ بِأَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَتَقُولُونَ بِأَفْوَاهِكُم مَّا لَيْسَ لَكُم بِهِۦ عِلْمٌۭ وَتَحْسَبُونَهُۥ هَيِّنًۭا وَهُوَ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: When you were receiving it with your tongues, and speaking with your mouths what you had no knowledge of, and thought it was a trivial (thing), when with God it was a mighty (thing) –

competing_variants.variant_arabic: إِذْ تَلِقُونَهُ بِأَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَتَقُولُونَ بِأَفْوَاهِكُمْ مَا لَيْسَ لَكُمْ بِهِ عِلْمٌ وَتَحْسَبُونَهُ هَيِّنًا وَهُوَ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ عَظِيمٌ
competing_variants.variant_english: When you tell lies about it with your tongues and say with your mouths that of which you have no knowledge and think it is insignificant while it is, in the sight of Allah, tremendous.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنِي يَحْيَى، حَدَّثَنَا وَكِيعٌ، عَنْ نَافِعِ بْنِ عُمَرَ، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ، عَنْ عَائِشَةَ ـ رضى الله عنها ـ كَانَتْ تَقْرَأُ ‏{‏إِذْ تَلِقُونَهُ بِأَلْسِنَتِكُمْ‏}‏ وَتَقُولُ الْوَلْقُ الْكَذِبُ‏.‏ قَالَ ابْنُ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ وَكَانَتْ أَعْلَمَ مِنْ غَيْرِهَا بِذَلِكَ لأَنَّهُ نَزَلَ فِيهَا‏.‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Ibn Abi Mulaika:`Aisha used to recite this Verse:-- 'Ida taliqunahu bi-alsinatikum' (24.15) "(As you tell lie with your tongues.)" and used to say "Al-Walaq" means "telling of a lie. "She knew this Verse more than anybody else as it was revealed about her

competing_variants.variant_arabic: إِذْ تَلِقُونَهُ بِأَلْسِنَتِكُمْ وَتَقُولُونَ بِأَفْوَاهِكُمْ مَا لَيْسَ لَكُمْ بِهِ عِلْمٌ وَتَحْسَبُونَهُ هَيِّنًا وَهُوَ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ عَظِيمٌ
competing_variants.variant_english: When you invented a lie (and carry it) on your tongues, and say with your mouths that of which you have no knowledge, and think it is insignificant, while it is, in the sight of Allah, tremendous.
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ مُوسَى، حَدَّثَنَا هِشَامٌ، أَنَّ ابْنَ جُرَيْجٍ، أَخْبَرَهُمْ قَالَ ابْنُ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ سَمِعْتُ عَائِشَةَ، تَقْرَأُ ‏{‏إِذْ تَلِقُونَهُ بِأَلْسِنَتِكُمْ‏}‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Narrated Ibn Abu Mulaika:I heard `Aisha reciting: "When you invented a lie (and carry it) on your tongues

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْلَآ إِذْ سَمِعْتُمُوهُ قُلْتُم مَّا يَكُونُ لَنَآ أَن نَّتَكَلَّمَ بِهَٰذَا سُبْحَٰنَكَ هَٰذَا بُهْتَٰنٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: why, when you heard it, did you not say, ‘It is not for us to speak about this. Glory to You! This is a great slander’?

verses.quran_arabic: يَعِظُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ أَن تَعُودُوا۟ لِمِثْلِهِۦٓ أَبَدًا إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: God admonishes you from ever returning to such a thing (again), if you are believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌ
verses.text: God makes clear to you the signs. God is knowing, wise.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحِبُّونَ أَن تَشِيعَ ٱلْفَٰحِشَةُ فِى ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌۭ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلْءَاخِرَةِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Surely those who love (allegations of) immorality to circulate among those who believe – for them (there is) a painful punishment in this world and the Hereafter. God knows, and you do not know.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُۥ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ رَءُوفٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: If (it were) not (for the) favor of God on you, and His mercy, and that God is kind, compassionate [. . .].

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ خُطُوَٰتِ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّبِعْ خُطُوَٰتِ ٱلشَّيْطَٰنِ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَأْمُرُ بِٱلْفَحْشَآءِ وَٱلْمُنكَرِ ۚ وَلَوْلَا فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ وَرَحْمَتُهُۥ مَا زَكَىٰ مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ أَبَدًۭا وَلَٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُزَكِّى مَن يَشَآءُ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: You who believe! Do not follow the footsteps of Satan. Whoever follows the footsteps of Satan – surely he commands (what is) immoral and wrong. If (it were) not (for the) favor of God on you, and His mercy, not one of you would ever have been pure. God purifies whomever He pleases. God is hearing, knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَا يَأْتَلِ أُو۟لُوا۟ ٱلْفَضْلِ مِنكُمْ وَٱلسَّعَةِ أَن يُؤْتُوٓا۟ أُو۟لِى ٱلْقُرْبَىٰ وَٱلْمَسَٰكِينَ وَٱلْمُهَٰجِرِينَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ وَلْيَعْفُوا۟ وَلْيَصْفَحُوٓا۟ ۗ أَلَا تُحِبُّونَ أَن يَغْفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌ
verses.text: Let not those of you who possess favor and abundance swear against giving (support) to family, and the poor, and the ones who emigrate in the way of God, but let them pardon and excuse (them). Would you not like God to forgive you? God is forgiving, compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَرْمُونَ ٱلْمُحْصَنَٰتِ ٱلْغَٰفِلَٰتِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ لُعِنُوا۟ فِى ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلْءَاخِرَةِ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Surely those who hurl (accusations) against chaste women – the oblivious (but) believing women – are accursed in this world and the Hereafter. For them (there is) a great punishment.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ تَشْهَدُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَلْسِنَتُهُمْ وَأَيْدِيهِمْ وَأَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: On the Day when their tongues, and their hands, and their feet will bear witness against them about what they have done,

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍۢ يُوَفِّيهِمُ ٱللَّهُ دِينَهُمُ ٱلْحَقَّ وَيَعْلَمُونَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْحَقُّ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: on that Day God will pay them their just due in full, and they will know that God – He is the clear Truth.

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلْخَبِيثَٰتُ لِلْخَبِيثِينَ وَٱلْخَبِيثُونَ لِلْخَبِيثَٰتِ ۖ وَٱلطَّيِّبَٰتُ لِلطَّيِّبِينَ وَٱلطَّيِّبُونَ لِلطَّيِّبَٰتِ ۚ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ مُبَرَّءُونَ مِمَّا يَقُولُونَ ۖ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌۭ وَرِزْقٌۭ كَرِيمٌۭ
verses.text: The bad women for the bad men, and the bad men for the bad women. And the good women for the good men, and the good men for the good women – those are (to be declared) innocent of what they say. For them (there is) forgiveness and generous provision.

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَدْخُلُوا۟ بُيُوتًا غَيْرَ بُيُوتِكُمْ حَتَّىٰ تَسْتَأْنِسُوا۟ وَتُسَلِّمُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهَا ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ لَّكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
verses.text: You who believe! Do not enter houses other than your (own) houses, until you ask permission and greet its inhabitants. That is better for you, so that you may take heed.

verses.quran_arabic: فَإِن لَّمْ تَجِدُوا۟ فِيهَآ أَحَدًۭا فَلَا تَدْخُلُوهَا حَتَّىٰ يُؤْذَنَ لَكُمْ ۖ وَإِن قِيلَ لَكُمُ ٱرْجِعُوا۟ فَٱرْجِعُوا۟ ۖ هُوَ أَزْكَىٰ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: But if you do not find anyone inside, do not enter it until permission is given to you. If it is said to you, ‘Go away,’ go away. It is purer for you. God is aware of what you do.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّيْسَ عَلَيْكُمْ جُنَاحٌ أَن تَدْخُلُوا۟ بُيُوتًا غَيْرَ مَسْكُونَةٍۢ فِيهَا مَتَٰعٌۭ لَّكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَعْلَمُ مَا تُبْدُونَ وَمَا تَكْتُمُونَ
verses.text: There is no blame on you that you enter uninhabited houses, where (there is) enjoyment for you. God knows what you reveal and what you conceal.

verses.quran_arabic: قُل لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَغُضُّوا۟ مِنْ أَبْصَٰرِهِمْ وَيَحْفَظُوا۟ فُرُوجَهُمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ أَزْكَىٰ لَهُمْ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا يَصْنَعُونَ
verses.text: Say to the believing men (that) they (should) lower their sight and guard their private parts. That is purer for them. Surely God is aware of what they do.

verses.quran_arabic: وَقُل لِّلْمُؤْمِنَٰتِ يَغْضُضْنَ مِنْ أَبْصَٰرِهِنَّ وَيَحْفَظْنَ فُرُوجَهُنَّ وَلَا يُبْدِينَ زِينَتَهُنَّ إِلَّا مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا ۖ وَلْيَضْرِبْنَ بِخُمُرِهِنَّ عَلَىٰ جُيُوبِهِنَّ ۖ وَلَا يُبْدِينَ زِينَتَهُنَّ إِلَّا لِبُعُولَتِهِنَّ أَوْ ءَابَآئِهِنَّ أَوْ ءَابَآءِ بُعُولَتِهِنَّ أَوْ أَبْنَآئِهِنَّ أَوْ أَبْنَآءِ بُعُولَتِهِنَّ أَوْ إِخْوَٰنِهِنَّ أَوْ بَنِىٓ إِخْوَٰنِهِنَّ أَوْ بَنِىٓ أَخَوَٰتِهِنَّ أَوْ نِسَآئِهِنَّ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَٰنُهُنَّ أَوِ ٱلتَّٰبِعِينَ غَيْرِ أُو۟لِى ٱلْإِرْبَةِ مِنَ ٱلرِّجَالِ أَوِ ٱلطِّفْلِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يَظْهَرُوا۟ عَلَىٰ عَوْرَٰتِ ٱلنِّسَآءِ ۖ وَلَا يَضْرِبْنَ بِأَرْجُلِهِنَّ لِيُعْلَمَ مَا يُخْفِينَ مِن زِينَتِهِنَّ ۚ وَتُوبُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ جَمِيعًا أَيُّهَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: And say to the believing women (that) they (should) lower their sight and guard their private parts, and not show their charms, except for what (normally) appears of them. And let them draw their head coverings over their breasts, and not show their charms, except to their husbands, or their fathers, or their husbands’ fathers, or their sons, or their husbands’ sons, or their brothers, or their brothers’ sons, or their sisters’ sons, or their women, or what their right (hands) own, or such men as attend (them who) have no (sexual) desire, or children (who are) not (yet) aware of women’s nakedness. And let them not stamp their feet to make known what they hide of their charms. Turn to God (in repentance) – all (of you) – believers, so that you may prosper.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَنكِحُوا۟ ٱلْأَيَٰمَىٰ مِنكُمْ وَٱلصَّٰلِحِينَ مِنْ عِبَادِكُمْ وَإِمَآئِكُمْ ۚ إِن يَكُونُوا۟ فُقَرَآءَ يُغْنِهِمُ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ وَٰسِعٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Marry off the unmarried among you, and (also) the righteous among your male slaves and your female slaves. If they are poor, God will enrich them from His favor. God is embracing, knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلْيَسْتَعْفِفِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَجِدُونَ نِكَاحًا حَتَّىٰ يُغْنِيَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ ۗ وَٱلَّذِينَ يَبْتَغُونَ ٱلْكِتَٰبَ مِمَّا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَٰنُكُمْ فَكَاتِبُوهُمْ إِنْ عَلِمْتُمْ فِيهِمْ خَيْرًۭا ۖ وَءَاتُوهُم مِّن مَّالِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ ءَاتَىٰكُمْ ۚ وَلَا تُكْرِهُوا۟ فَتَيَٰتِكُمْ عَلَى ٱلْبِغَآءِ إِنْ أَرَدْنَ تَحَصُّنًۭا لِّتَبْتَغُوا۟ عَرَضَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۚ وَمَن يُكْرِههُّنَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ مِنۢ بَعْدِ إِكْرَٰهِهِنَّ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Let those who do not find (the means for) marriage abstain, until God enriches them from His favor. Those who seek the writ, among what your right (hands) own, write (it) for them, if you know any good in them, and give them some of the wealth of God which He has given you. And do not force your young women into prostitution, if they wish (to live in) chastity, so that you may seek (the fleeting) goods of this present life. Whoever forces them – surely God is forgiving (and) compassionate (to them) after their being forced.

competing_variants.variant_arabic: وَلْيَسْتَعْفِفِ الَّذِينَ لَا يَجِدُونَ نِكَاحًا حَتَّىٰ يُغْنِيَهُمُ اللَّهُ مِن فَضْلِهِ ۗ وَالَّذِينَ يَبْتَغُونَ الْكِتَابَ مِمَّا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُكُمْ فَكَاتِبُوهُمْ إِنْ عَلِمْتُمْ فِيهِمْ خَيْرًا ۖ وَآتُوهُم مِّن مَّالِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي آتَاكُمْ ۚ وَلَا تُكْرِهُوا فَتَيَاتِكُمْ عَلَى الْبِغَاءِ إِنْ أَرَدْنَ تَحَصُّنًا لِّتَبْتَغُوا عَرَضَ الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا ۚ وَمَن يُكْرِههُّنَّ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ مِن بَعْدِ إِكْرَاهِهِنَّ لَهُنَّ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
competing_variants.variant_english: And let those who find not the financial means for marriage keep themselves chaste, until Allah enriches them of His Bounty. And such of your slaves as seek a writing (of emancipation), give them such writing, if you know that they are good and trustworthy. And give them something yourselves out of the wealth of Allah which He has bestowed upon you. And compel not your slave-girls to prostitution when they desire to keep chaste in order to seek the frail goods of this world's life, and whoever compels them, then surely after their compulsion Allah is Forgiving, Merciful (to them).
competing_variants.hadith_arabic: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو بَكْرِ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ، وَأَبُو كُرَيْبٍ جَمِيعًا عَنْ أَبِي مُعَاوِيَةَ، - وَاللَّفْظُ لأَبِي كُرَيْبٍ - حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، حَدَّثَنَا الأَعْمَشُ، عَنْ أَبِي سُفْيَانَ، عَنْ جَابِرٍ، قَالَ كَانَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ أُبَىٍّ ابْنِ سَلُولَ يَقُولُ لِجَارِيَةٍ لَهُ اذْهَبِي فَابْغِينَا شَيْئًا فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ ‏{‏ وَلاَ تُكْرِهُوا فَتَيَاتِكُمْ عَلَى الْبِغَاءِ إِنْ أَرَدْنَ تَحَصُّنًا لِتَبْتَغُوا عَرَضَ الْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا وَمَنْ يُكْرِهْهُنَّ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ مِنْ بَعْدِ إِكْرَاهِهِنَّ‏}‏ لَهُنَّ ‏{‏ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ‏}‏
competing_variants.hadith_english: Jabir reported that 'Abdullah b. Ubayy b. Salul used to say to his slave-girl:Go and fetch something for us by committing prostitution. It was in this connection that Allah, the Exalted and Glorious, revealed this verse:" And compel not your slave-girls to prostitution when they desire to keep chaste in order to seek the frail goods of this world's life, and whoever compels them, then surely after their compulsion Allah is Forgiving, Merciful" (xxiv) [omitted from the original translation: to them]

verses.quran_arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ ءَايَٰتٍۢ مُّبَيِّنَٰتٍۢ وَمَثَلًۭا مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوْا۟ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ وَمَوْعِظَةًۭ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
verses.text: Certainly We have sent down to you clear signs, and an example of those who passed away before you, and an admonition for those who guard (themselves).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ مِن قَبۡلِكُمۡ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا إِلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ اَ۬لَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ  مِن قَبۡلِكُمۡ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ مِن قَبۡلِكُمۡ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيِّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ مِن قَبۡلِكُمۡ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And We have most surely sent down to you clarifying signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا إِلَيۡكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ مِن قَبۡلِكُمُۥ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا إِلَيۡكُمُۥ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلٗا مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوۡاْ مِن قَبۡلِكُمُۥ وَمَوۡعِظَةٗ لِّلۡمُتَّقِينَ
canonical_variants.english: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَا إِلَيْكُمْ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلاٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لذِينَ خَلَوْاْ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ وَمَوْعِظَةٗ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

canonical_variants.arabic: وَلَقَدَ اَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمُۥٓ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖ وَمَثَلاٗ مِّنَ اَ۬لذِينَ خَلَوْاْ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ وَمَوْعِظَةٗ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَۖ
canonical_variants.english: And We have most surely sent down to you clarified signs and a parable from those who passed on before you, and an admonition for the ones who were mindful (of God).

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ ٱللَّهُ نُورُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ مَثَلُ نُورِهِۦ كَمِشْكَوٰةٍۢ فِيهَا مِصْبَاحٌ ۖ ٱلْمِصْبَاحُ فِى زُجَاجَةٍ ۖ ٱلزُّجَاجَةُ كَأَنَّهَا كَوْكَبٌۭ دُرِّىٌّۭ يُوقَدُ مِن شَجَرَةٍۢ مُّبَٰرَكَةٍۢ زَيْتُونَةٍۢ لَّا شَرْقِيَّةٍۢ وَلَا غَرْبِيَّةٍۢ يَكَادُ زَيْتُهَا يُضِىٓءُ وَلَوْ لَمْ تَمْسَسْهُ نَارٌۭ ۚ نُّورٌ عَلَىٰ نُورٍۢ ۗ يَهْدِى ٱللَّهُ لِنُورِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَيَضْرِبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْأَمْثَٰلَ لِلنَّاسِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: God (is the) light of the heavens and the earth. A parable of His light (is) like a niche in which (there is) a lamp, the lamp in a glass, the glass as it were a brilliant star, lit from a blessed tree, an olive (tree) neither (of the) East nor (of the) West, whose oil would almost shine, even if no fire touched it – light upon light – God guides to His light whomever He pleases, and God strikes parables for the people, and God has knowledge of everything –

verses.quran_arabic: فِى بُيُوتٍ أَذِنَ ٱللَّهُ أَن تُرْفَعَ وَيُذْكَرَ فِيهَا ٱسْمُهُۥ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُۥ فِيهَا بِٱلْغُدُوِّ وَٱلْءَاصَالِ
verses.text: in houses (which) God permitted to be raised up and in which His name was remembered. Glorifying Him there, in the mornings and the evenings,

verses.quran_arabic: رِجَالٌۭ لَّا تُلْهِيهِمْ تِجَٰرَةٌۭ وَلَا بَيْعٌ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ وَإِقَامِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَإِيتَآءِ ٱلزَّكَوٰةِ ۙ يَخَافُونَ يَوْمًۭا تَتَقَلَّبُ فِيهِ ٱلْقُلُوبُ وَٱلْأَبْصَٰرُ
verses.text: were men (whom) neither (any business) transaction nor (any) bargaining would divert from the remembrance of God, or (from) observing the prayer and giving the alms. They feared a Day on which the hearts and the sight would be overturned,

verses.quran_arabic: لِيَجْزِيَهُمُ ٱللَّهُ أَحْسَنَ مَا عَمِلُوا۟ وَيَزِيدَهُم مِّن فَضْلِهِۦ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ يَرْزُقُ مَن يَشَآءُ بِغَيْرِ حِسَابٍۢ
verses.text: so that God might repay them (for the) best of what they had done, and increase them from His favor. God provides for whomever He pleases without reckoning.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوٓا۟ أَعْمَٰلُهُمْ كَسَرَابٍۭ بِقِيعَةٍۢ يَحْسَبُهُ ٱلظَّمْـَٔانُ مَآءً حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَهُۥ لَمْ يَجِدْهُ شَيْـًۭٔا وَوَجَدَ ٱللَّهَ عِندَهُۥ فَوَفَّىٰهُ حِسَابَهُۥ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَرِيعُ ٱلْحِسَابِ
verses.text: But those who disbelieve – their deeds are like a mirage in a desert which the thirsty man thinks (to be) water, until, when he comes to it, he finds it (to be) nothing, but he finds God beside him, and then He pays him his account in full. God is quick at the reckoning.

verses.quran_arabic: أَوْ كَظُلُمَٰتٍۢ فِى بَحْرٍۢ لُّجِّىٍّۢ يَغْشَىٰهُ مَوْجٌۭ مِّن فَوْقِهِۦ مَوْجٌۭ مِّن فَوْقِهِۦ سَحَابٌۭ ۚ ظُلُمَٰتٌۢ بَعْضُهَا فَوْقَ بَعْضٍ إِذَآ أَخْرَجَ يَدَهُۥ لَمْ يَكَدْ يَرَىٰهَا ۗ وَمَن لَّمْ يَجْعَلِ ٱللَّهُ لَهُۥ نُورًۭا فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن نُّورٍ
verses.text: Or (he is) like the darkness in a deep sea – a wave covers him, above which is (another) wave, above which is a cloud – darkness upon darkness. When he puts out his hand, he can hardly see it. The one to whom God does not give light has no light (at all).

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوۡ كَظُلُمَٰتٖ فِي بَحۡرٖ لُّجِّيّٖ يَغۡشَىٰهُۥ مَوۡجٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهِۦ مَوۡجٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهِۦ سَحَابُ ظُلُمَٰتِۭ بَعۡضُهَا فَوۡقَ بَعۡضٍ إِذَا أَخۡرَجَ يَدَهُۥ لَمۡ يَكَدۡ يَرَىٰهَاۗ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَجۡعَلِ ٱللَّهُ لَهُۥ نُورٗا فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن نُّورٍ
canonical_variants.english: Or (they are) like darkness(es) in an abysmal sea, covered by waves, above which are waves, above which are clouds of darkness(es), one upon the other. If one holds out his hand, he can hardly see it. For whomever Allah has not granted a light has no light.

canonical_variants.arabic: أَوۡ كَظُلُمَٰتٖ فِي بَحۡرٖ لُّجِّيّٖ يَغۡشَىٰهُۥ مَوۡجٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهِۦ مَوۡجٞ مِّن فَوۡقِهِۦ سَحَابٞۚ ظُلُمَٰتِۭ بَعۡضُهَا فَوۡقَ بَعۡضٍ إِذَا أَخۡرَجَ يَدَهُۥ لَمۡ يَكَدۡ يَرَىٰهَاۗ وَمَن لَّمۡ يَجۡعَلِ ٱللَّهُ لَهُۥ نُورٗا فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن نُّورٍ
canonical_variants.english: Or (they are) like darkness(es) in an abysmal sea, covered by waves, above which are waves, above which are clouds. (These) darkness(es) (are) one upon the other. If one holds out his hand, he can hardly see it. For whomever Allah has not granted a light has no light.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱلطَّيْرُ صَٰٓفَّٰتٍۢ ۖ كُلٌّۭ قَدْ عَلِمَ صَلَاتَهُۥ وَتَسْبِيحَهُۥ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا يَفْعَلُونَ
verses.text: Do you not see that God – whatever is in the heavens and the earth glorifies Him, and (so do) the birds spreading (their wings in flight)? Each one knows its prayer and its glorifying, and God is aware of what they do.

verses.quran_arabic: وَلِلَّهِ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: To God (belongs) the kingdom of the heavens and the earth. To God is the (final) destination.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُزْجِى سَحَابًۭا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيْنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجْعَلُهُۥ رُكَامًۭا فَتَرَى ٱلْوَدْقَ يَخْرُجُ مِنْ خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنَزِّلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٍۢ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٍۢ فَيُصِيبُ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَصْرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُ ۖ يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرْقِهِۦ يَذْهَبُ بِٱلْأَبْصَٰرِ
verses.text: Do you not see that God drives the clouds, then gathers them, then makes them (into) a mass, and then you see the rain come forth from the midst of it? He sends down mountains (of them) from the sky, in which (there is) hail, and He smites whomever He pleases with it, and turns it away from whomever He pleases. The flash of His lightning almost takes away the sight.

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يُزۡجِي سَحَابٗا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ رُكَامٗا فَتَرَى اَ۬لۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٖ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٖ فَيُصِيبُ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَصۡرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُۖ يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرۡقِهِۦ يَذۡهَبُ بِالۡأَبۡصٰ۪رِۚ  يُقَلِّبُ اُ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لَّيۡلَ وَاَلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّأُوْلِي اِ۬لۡأَبۡصٰ۪رِ
canonical_variants.english: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He bestows from on high, from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).

canonical_variants.arabic: ۞ أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ اَ۬للَّهَ يُزۡجِي  سَحَابٗا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ رُكَامٗا فَتَر۪ي اَ۬لۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ  خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ اَ۬لسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٖ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٖ فَيُصِيب بِّهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ  وَيَصۡرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُۖ يَكَاد سَّنَا بَرۡقِهِۦ يَذۡهَب بِّالۡأَبۡصٰ۪رِۚ   يُقَلِّبُ اُ۬للَّهُ اُ۬لَّيۡلَ وَاَلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّأُوْلِي اِ۬لۡأَبۡصٰ۪رِ
canonical_variants.english: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He bestows from on high, from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُزۡجِي سَحَابٗا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ رُكَامٗا فَتَرَى ٱلۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٖ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٖ فَيُصِيبُ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَصۡرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُۖ يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرۡقِهِۦ يَذۡهَبُ بِٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِۚ  يُقَلِّبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
canonical_variants.english: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He bestows from on high, from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).

canonical_variants.arabic: أَلَمۡ تَرَ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُزۡجِي سَحَابٗا ثُمَّ يُؤَلِّفُ بَيۡنَهُۥ ثُمَّ يَجۡعَلُهُۥ رُكَامٗا فَتَرَى ٱلۡوَدۡقَ يَخۡرُجُ مِنۡ خِلَٰلِهِۦ وَيُنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مِن جِبَالٖ فِيهَا مِنۢ بَرَدٖ فَيُصِيبُ بِهِۦ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَصۡرِفُهُۥ عَن مَّن يَشَآءُۖ يَكَادُ سَنَا بَرۡقِهِۦ يَذۡهَبُ بِٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِۚ  يُقَلِّبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَۚ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبۡرَةٗ لِّأُوْلِي ٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرِ
canonical_variants.english: Have you not seen how Allah propels clouds, then brings them together, then piles them up in heaps so you see rainfall coming out of its midst? And He bestows from on high, from the sky—from mountains in it—some hail, striking with it whomever He wills and diverting it from whomever He wills? The flash of its lightening almost does away with the sight(s).

verses.quran_arabic: يُقَلِّبُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةًۭ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلْأَبْصَٰرِ
verses.text: God alternates the night and the day. Surely in that is a lesson indeed for those who have sight.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَ كُلَّ دَآبَّةٍۢ مِّن مَّآءٍۢ ۖ فَمِنْهُم مَّن يَمْشِى عَلَىٰ بَطْنِهِۦ وَمِنْهُم مَّن يَمْشِى عَلَىٰ رِجْلَيْنِ وَمِنْهُم مَّن يَمْشِى عَلَىٰٓ أَرْبَعٍۢ ۚ يَخْلُقُ ٱللَّهُ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍۢ قَدِيرٌۭ
verses.text: God has created every living creature from water. (There are) some of them who walk on their bellies, and some of them who walk on two feet, and some of them who walk on four. God creates whatever He pleases. Surely God is powerful over everything.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ ءَايَٰتٍۢ مُّبَيِّنَٰتٍۢ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍۢ مُّسْتَقِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Certainly We have sent down clear signs. God guides whomever He pleases to a straight path.

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ وَاَللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
canonical_variants.english: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ  وَاَللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
canonical_variants.english: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
canonical_variants.english: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَآ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيِّنَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
canonical_variants.english: Most surely, We have sent down clarifying signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
canonical_variants.english: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّقَدۡ أَنزَلۡنَا ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۚ وَٱللَّهُ يَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِۜرَٰطٖ مُّسۡتَقِيمٖ
canonical_variants.english: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّقَدْ أَنزَلْنَا ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۖ وَاللَّهُ يَهْدِے مَنْ يَّشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسْتَقِيمٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.

canonical_variants.arabic: لَّقَدَ اَنزَلْنَآ ءَايَٰتٖ مُّبَيَّنَٰتٖۖ وَاللَّهُ يَهْدِے مَنْ يَّشَآءُ اِ۪لَىٰ صِرَٰطٖ مُّسْتَقِيمٖۖ
canonical_variants.english: Most surely, We have sent down clarified signs, and Allah guides whomever He wills to a straight path.

verses.quran_arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ ءَامَنَّا بِٱللَّهِ وَبِٱلرَّسُولِ وَأَطَعْنَا ثُمَّ يَتَوَلَّىٰ فَرِيقٌۭ مِّنْهُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ ذَٰلِكَ ۚ وَمَآ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ بِٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
verses.text: They say, ‘We believe in God and the messenger, and we obey.’ Then, after that, a group of them turns away. Those are not with the believers.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا دُعُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ لِيَحْكُمَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِذَا فَرِيقٌۭ مِّنْهُم مُّعْرِضُونَ
verses.text: When they are called to God and His messenger, so that he may judge between them, suddenly a group of them turns away.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن يَكُن لَّهُمُ ٱلْحَقُّ يَأْتُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ مُذْعِنِينَ
verses.text: But if (they think) the truth is on their side, they come to him readily.

verses.quran_arabic: أَفِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ أَمِ ٱرْتَابُوٓا۟ أَمْ يَخَافُونَ أَن يَحِيفَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِمْ وَرَسُولُهُۥ ۚ بَلْ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّٰلِمُونَ
verses.text: (Is there) a sickness in their hearts, or do they doubt, or do they fear that God will be unjust to them, and His messenger (too)? No! Those – they are the evildoers.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّمَا كَانَ قَوْلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِذَا دُعُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ لِيَحْكُمَ بَيْنَهُمْ أَن يَقُولُوا۟ سَمِعْنَا وَأَطَعْنَا ۚ وَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
verses.text: The only saying of the believers, when they are called to God and His messenger so that he may judge between them, is that they say, ‘We hear and obey.’ Those – they are the ones who prosper.

verses.quran_arabic: وَمَن يُطِعِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ وَيَخْشَ ٱللَّهَ وَيَتَّقْهِ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَآئِزُونَ
verses.text: Whoever obeys God and His messenger, and fears God, and guards (himself) against Him, those – they are the triumphant.

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَأَقْسَمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ جَهْدَ أَيْمَٰنِهِمْ لَئِنْ أَمَرْتَهُمْ لَيَخْرُجُنَّ ۖ قُل لَّا تُقْسِمُوا۟ ۖ طَاعَةٌۭ مَّعْرُوفَةٌ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: They have sworn by God the most solemn of their oaths: if indeed you command them, they will indeed go forth. Say: ‘Do not swear! Honorable obedience (is sufficient). Surely God is aware of what you do.’

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ أَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ ۖ فَإِن تَوَلَّوْا۟ فَإِنَّمَا عَلَيْهِ مَا حُمِّلَ وَعَلَيْكُم مَّا حُمِّلْتُمْ ۖ وَإِن تُطِيعُوهُ تَهْتَدُوا۟ ۚ وَمَا عَلَى ٱلرَّسُولِ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ
verses.text: Say: ‘Obey God and obey the messenger! If you turn away, (there is) only on him what is laid on him, and (only) on you what is laid on you. But if you obey him, you will be (rightly) guided. Nothing (depends) on the messenger except the clear delivery (of the message).’

verses.quran_arabic: وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَيَسْتَخْلِفَنَّهُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمَا ٱسْتَخْلَفَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ وَلَيُمَكِّنَنَّ لَهُمْ دِينَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى ٱرْتَضَىٰ لَهُمْ وَلَيُبَدِّلَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَعْدِ خَوْفِهِمْ أَمْنًۭا ۚ يَعْبُدُونَنِى لَا يُشْرِكُونَ بِى شَيْـًۭٔا ۚ وَمَن كَفَرَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَٰسِقُونَ
verses.text: God has promised those of you who believe and do righteous deeds that He will indeed make them successors on the earth, (even) as He made those who were before them successors, and (that) He will indeed establish their religion for them – that which He has approved for them – and (that) He will indeed give them security in exchange for their former fear: ‘They will serve Me, not associating anything with Me. Whoever disbelieves after that, those – they are the wicked.’

canonical_variants.arabic: وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَيَسۡتَخۡلِفَنَّهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ كَمَا ٱسۡتُخۡلِفَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ وَلَيُمَكِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ دِينَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي ٱرۡتَضَىٰ لَهُمۡ وَلَيُبۡدِلَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ خَوۡفِهِمۡ أَمۡنٗاۚ يَعۡبُدُونَنِي لَا يُشۡرِكُونَ بِي شَيۡـٔٗاۚ وَمَن كَفَرَ بَعۡدَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡفَٰسِقُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Allah has promised those of you who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds that He will most surely make them successors in the land as those before them were made successors (of others), and that He will most surely establish for them their religion which He has approved for them, and that He will most surely substitute security in place of their fear—as they worship Me, never associating anything with Me. But whoever denies after that—those are the defiantly disobedient.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَعَدَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ مِنكُمۡ وَعَمِلُواْ ٱلصَّٰلِحَٰتِ لَيَسۡتَخۡلِفَنَّهُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ كَمَا ٱسۡتَخۡلَفَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ وَلَيُمَكِّنَنَّ لَهُمۡ دِينَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي ٱرۡتَضَىٰ لَهُمۡ وَلَيُبَدِّلَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَعۡدِ خَوۡفِهِمۡ أَمۡنٗاۚ يَعۡبُدُونَنِي لَا يُشۡرِكُونَ بِي شَيۡـٔٗاۚ وَمَن كَفَرَ بَعۡدَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡفَٰسِقُونَ
canonical_variants.english: Allah has promised those of you who have attained faith and have done righteous deeds that He will most surely make them successors in the land as He made those before them successors (of others), and that He will most surely establish for them their religion which He has approved for them, and that He will most surely substitute security in place of their fear—as they worship Me, never associating anything with Me. But whoever denies after that—those are the defiantly disobedient.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
verses.text: Observe the prayer and give the alms, and obey the messenger, so that you may receive compassion.

verses.quran_arabic: لَا تَحْسَبَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مُعْجِزِينَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَمَأْوَىٰهُمُ ٱلنَّارُ ۖ وَلَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
verses.text: Do not think (that) those who disbelieve are able to escape (God) on the earth. Their refuge is the Fire – and it is indeed an evil destination!

verses.quran_arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لِيَسْتَـْٔذِنكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَٰنُكُمْ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يَبْلُغُوا۟ ٱلْحُلُمَ مِنكُمْ ثَلَٰثَ مَرَّٰتٍۢ ۚ مِّن قَبْلِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلْفَجْرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنۢ بَعْدِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلْعِشَآءِ ۚ ثَلَٰثُ عَوْرَٰتٍۢ لَّكُمْ ۚ لَيْسَ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَا عَلَيْهِمْ جُنَاحٌۢ بَعْدَهُنَّ ۚ طَوَّٰفُونَ عَلَيْكُم بَعْضُكُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌۭ
verses.text: You who believe! Let those whom your right (hands) own, and those of you who have not reached the (age of) puberty, ask permission of you at three times (of the day) – before the dawn prayer, and when you lay down your clothes at the noon hour, and after the evening prayer – the three (times) of nakedness for you. But beyond those (times) there is no blame on you or on them in going about among each other. In this way God makes clear to you the signs. God is knowing, wise.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لِيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمۡ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَمۡ يَبۡلُغُواْ ٱلۡحُلُمَ مِنكُمۡ ثَلَٰثَ مَرَّٰتٖۚ مِّن قَبۡلِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡفَجۡرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنۢ بَعۡدِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡعِشَآءِ ثَلَٰثَ عَوۡرَٰتٖ لَّكُمۡۚ لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَلَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ جُنَاحُۢ بَعۡدَهُنَّۚ طَوَّٰفُونَ عَلَيۡكُم بَعۡضُكُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering) on three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لِيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمۡ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَمۡ يَبۡلُغُواْ ٱلۡحُلُمَ مِنكُمۡ ثَلَٰثَ مَرَّٰتٖۚ مِّن قَبۡلِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡفَجۡرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنۢ بَعۡدِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡعِشَآءِۚ ثَلَٰثُ عَوۡرَٰتٖ لَّكُمۡۚ لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ وَلَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ جُنَاحُۢ بَعۡدَهُنَّۚ طَوَّٰفُونَ عَلَيۡكُم بَعۡضُكُمۡ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering). Three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لِيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمُۥ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَمۡ يَبۡلُغُواْ ٱلۡحُلُمَ مِنكُمُۥ ثَلَٰثَ مَرَّٰتٖۚ مِّن قَبۡلِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡفَجۡرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنۢ بَعۡدِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡعِشَآءِۚ ثَلَٰثُ عَوۡرَٰتٖ لَّكُمُۥۚ لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ وَلَا عَلَيۡهِمُۥ جُنَاحُۢ بَعۡدَهُنَّۚ طَوَّٰفُونَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ بَعۡضُكُمُۥ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering). Three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

canonical_variants.arabic: يَٰأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ لِيَسۡتَـٔۡذِنكُمُ ٱلَّذِينَ مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُكُمُۥ وَٱلَّذِينَ لَمۡ يَبۡلُغُواْ ٱلۡحُلُمَ مِنكُمُۥ ثَلَٰثَ مَرَّٰتٖۚ مِّن قَبۡلِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡفَجۡرِ وَحِينَ تَضَعُونَ ثِيَابَكُمُۥ مِنَ ٱلظَّهِيرَةِ وَمِنۢ بَعۡدِ صَلَوٰةِ ٱلۡعِشَآءِۚ ثَلَٰثُ عَوۡرَٰتٖ لَّكُمُۥۚ لَيۡسَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ وَلَا عَلَيۡهِمُۥ جُنَاحُۢ بَعۡدَهُنَّۚ طَوَّٰفُونَ عَلَيۡكُمُۥ بَعۡضُكُمُۥ عَلَىٰ بَعۡضٖۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأٓيَٰتِۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٞ
canonical_variants.english: O you who have attained faith, let those whom you rightfully possess and those of you who have not reached puberty seek your permission (before entering). Three occasions: before the dawn prayer and at noon when you lay aside your clothes and after the evening prayer—three occasions of privacy for you. At other times, neither you nor they commit sin by intermingling with one another; Allah thus clarifies the signs for you. For Allah is All-Knowing, All-Wise.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِذَا بَلَغَ ٱلْأَطْفَٰلُ مِنكُمُ ٱلْحُلُمَ فَلْيَسْتَـْٔذِنُوا۟ كَمَا ٱسْتَـْٔذَنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمْ ءَايَٰتِهِۦ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌ حَكِيمٌۭ
verses.text: When your children reach the (age of) puberty, let them ask permission (before entering), as those before them asked permission. In this way God makes clear to you His signs. God is knowing, wise.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْقَوَٰعِدُ مِنَ ٱلنِّسَآءِ ٱلَّٰتِى لَا يَرْجُونَ نِكَاحًۭا فَلَيْسَ عَلَيْهِنَّ جُنَاحٌ أَن يَضَعْنَ ثِيَابَهُنَّ غَيْرَ مُتَبَرِّجَٰتٍۭ بِزِينَةٍۢ ۖ وَأَن يَسْتَعْفِفْنَ خَيْرٌۭ لَّهُنَّ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
verses.text: And your women who are past childbearing and have no hope of marriage, there is no blame on them that they lay down their clothes, (as long as there is) no flaunting of (their) charms. But that they abstain is better for them. God is hearing, knowing.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّيْسَ عَلَى ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ حَرَجٌۭ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلْأَعْرَجِ حَرَجٌۭ وَلَا عَلَى ٱلْمَرِيضِ حَرَجٌۭ وَلَا عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ أَن تَأْكُلُوا۟ مِنۢ بُيُوتِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ ءَابَآئِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ أُمَّهَٰتِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ إِخْوَٰنِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ أَخَوَٰتِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ أَعْمَٰمِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ عَمَّٰتِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ أَخْوَٰلِكُمْ أَوْ بُيُوتِ خَٰلَٰتِكُمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكْتُم مَّفَاتِحَهُۥٓ أَوْ صَدِيقِكُمْ ۚ لَيْسَ عَلَيْكُمْ جُنَاحٌ أَن تَأْكُلُوا۟ جَمِيعًا أَوْ أَشْتَاتًۭا ۚ فَإِذَا دَخَلْتُم بُيُوتًۭا فَسَلِّمُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ تَحِيَّةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِ ٱللَّهِ مُبَٰرَكَةًۭ طَيِّبَةًۭ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُبَيِّنُ ٱللَّهُ لَكُمُ ٱلْءَايَٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ
verses.text: There is no blame on the blind, and no blame on the disabled, and no blame on the sick, nor on yourselves, that you eat at your houses, or your fathers’ houses, or your mothers’ houses, or your brothers’ houses, or your sisters’ houses, or your paternal uncles’ houses, or your paternal aunts’ houses, or your maternal uncles’ houses, or your maternal aunts’ houses, or (at houses) of which you possess the keys, or (at the house) of your friend. There is no blame on you that you eat together or in separate groups. When you enter (these) houses, greet one another (with) a greeting from God, blessed (and) good. In this way God makes clear to you the signs, so that you may understand.

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّمَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَإِذَا كَانُوا۟ مَعَهُۥ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍۢ جَامِعٍۢ لَّمْ يَذْهَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يَسْتَـْٔذِنُوهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَسْتَـْٔذِنُونَكَ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۚ فَإِذَا ٱسْتَـْٔذَنُوكَ لِبَعْضِ شَأْنِهِمْ فَأْذَن لِّمَن شِئْتَ مِنْهُمْ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمُ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
verses.text: Only those are believers who believe in God and His messenger, and who, when they are with him on some common matter, do not go away until they ask his permission. Surely those who ask your permission – those are the ones who believe in God and His messenger. When they ask your permission for some affair of theirs, give permission to whomever you please of them, and ask forgiveness for them from God. Surely God is forgiving, compassionate.

verses.quran_arabic: لَّا تَجْعَلُوا۟ دُعَآءَ ٱلرَّسُولِ بَيْنَكُمْ كَدُعَآءِ بَعْضِكُم بَعْضًۭا ۚ قَدْ يَعْلَمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتَسَلَّلُونَ مِنكُمْ لِوَاذًۭا ۚ فَلْيَحْذَرِ ٱلَّذِينَ يُخَالِفُونَ عَنْ أَمْرِهِۦٓ أَن تُصِيبَهُمْ فِتْنَةٌ أَوْ يُصِيبَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
verses.text: Do not make the messenger’s calling of you like the calling of some of you to others. God already knows those of you who slip away secretly. Let those who go against his command beware, or trouble will smite them, or a painful punishment will smite them.

verses.quran_arabic: أَلَآ إِنَّ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ قَدْ يَعْلَمُ مَآ أَنتُمْ عَلَيْهِ وَيَوْمَ يُرْجَعُونَ إِلَيْهِ فَيُنَبِّئُهُم بِمَا عَمِلُوا۟ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌۢ
verses.text: Is it not a fact that to God (belongs) whatever is in the heavens and the earth? He already knows what you are up to, and on the Day when they will be returned to Him, He will inform them about what they have done. God has knowledge of everything.
